name: scail-character-animation-3d
description: In-context learning approach for studio-grade 3D character animation
content:
## SCAIL: Studio-Grade Character Animation

### Core Concept

This skill implements techniques from paper arXiv:2512.05905 for improving agent reasoning, adaptation, and decision-making in complex tasks.

### Implementation

See paper for implementation details: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.05905

### Practical Guidance

Key techniques from this paper can enhance agent capabilities in:
- Reasoning under uncertainty
- Adaptive learning
- Multi-step planning
- Robustness and generalization

Refer to the paper's methodology sections for specific implementation guidance.
